title: Smoke Bites Midnight Bun
description: A whole30-friendly, umami-rich Jamaican dish featuring crumbly midnight-craving buns infused with smoky flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add coconut flakes and whisk to distribute evenly.
Whisk in egg whites until no visible liquid remains. The mixture will be very stiff.
Gradually add canola oil and water while mixing with a rubber spatula until you form dough. The consistency should be like play-doh.
On a floured surface, roll out the dough to about 1/4 inch thickness.
Use cookie cutters or any shape of your choice to cut out buns. Place them on a lined baking sheet with parchment paper under them for easier removal.
Let it rest at room temperature for 5-10 minutes before cooking. This allows the air bubbles to settle down and makes them fluffier.
Bake in preheated oven for about 20-30 minutes or until golden brown on top, and the center is set.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
